'''nathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:saltando|saltando]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saltando|saltando]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nathate|nathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nathatesher|nathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathatesherĂ«m|nathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nathatero|nathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nathateshĂ«|nathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathateshĂ«m|nathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinathatero|gokinathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinathateshĂ«|gokinathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathateshĂ«m|gokinathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonathankerom|gonathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonathankeshĂ«|gonathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonathankeshĂ«m|gonathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonathankeya|gonathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nathaterom|nathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathatemu|nathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nathateya|nathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinathaterom|gokinathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathatemu|gokinathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinathateya|gokinathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nathathate|nathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nathathatesher|nathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathathatesherĂ«m|nathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nathathatero|nathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nathathateshĂ«|nathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathathateshĂ«m|nathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinathathatero|gokinathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinathathateshĂ«|gokinathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathathateshĂ«m|gokinathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonathathankerom|gonathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonathathankeshĂ«|gonathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonathathankeshĂ«m|gonathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonathathankeya|gonathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nathathaterom|nathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nathathatemu|nathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nathathateya|nathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinathathaterom|gokinathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinathathatemu|gokinathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinathathateya|gokinathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠte|nĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠtesher|nĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠtero|nĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠthĂŠtero|gokinĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠterom|nĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠtemu|nĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠthĂŠteya|nĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠthĂŠterom|gokinĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠthĂŠteya|gokinĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafthafte|nafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafthaftesher|nafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafthaftesherĂ«m|nafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafthaftero|nafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafthafteshĂ«|nafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafthafteshĂ«m|nafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafthaftero|gokinafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafthafteshĂ«|gokinafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafthafteshĂ«m|gokinafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafthafnkerom|gonafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafthafnkeshĂ«|gonafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafthafnkeshĂ«m|gonafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafthafnkeya|gonafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafthafterom|nafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafthaftemu|nafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafthafteya|nafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafthafterom|gokinafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafthaftemu|gokinafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafthafteya|gokinafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
